event: Portrait of a young man with red cap
description: A bust-length portrait of a young man with curly brown hair wearing a bright red cap and a dark blue-gray pleated tunic or doublet with a light collar. He gazes directly at the viewer with a calm, composed expression. Behind him is a blue sky visible through a rectangular stone window or frame. The painting is rendered with smooth, precise contours and subtle modeling.

_meta.title: Portrait of a young man with red cap
